languages.text: {n}Стоит вашему имени прозвучать, как люди вокруг преображаются. У одних на лицах проступает благоговение, прочие же бледнеют подобно мертвецам. Стоящий напротив мужчина складывает аквилу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Стоит вашему имени прозвучать, как люди вокруг преображаются. У одних на лицах проступает благоговение, прочие же бледнеют подобно мертвецам. Стоящий напротив мужчина складывает аквилу.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Стоит вашему имени прозвучать, как люди вокруг преображаются. У одних на лицах проступает благоговение, прочие же бледнеют подобно мертвецам. Стоящий напротив мужчина складывает аквилу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The moment your name is spoken, a transformation sweeps through the crowd. Some are struck with awe; others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
{n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

{n}Janur's eyes harden upon hearing who you are — and some of the soldiers accompanying him turn stony-faced. Others, however, look at you with admiration and smiles, touching the Aquilas carved into their armour.{/n}
{n}The moment your name is spoken, a transformation sweeps through the crowd. Some are struck with awe; others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
{n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
{n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ジャヌールはあなたの正体を知ると、顔色が悪くなった。そして、彼の従者の中には、顔色が悪くなった者もいる。しかし、中には、あなたを賞賛し、笑顔で、鎧に刻まれたアギラスに触れる者もいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Janur's eyes harden upon hearing who you are — and some of the soldiers accompanying him turn stony-faced. Others, however, look at you with admiration and smiles, touching the Aquilas carved into their armour.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Adın söylendiği an kalabalıkta bir dalgalanma yaşanıyor. Kimileri huşu içinde kalırken kimileri de hayalet misali bembeyaz kesiliyor. Önündeki adam, Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Adın söylendiği an kalabalıkta bir dalgalanma yaşanıyor. Kimileri huşu içinde kalırken kimileri de hayalet misali bembeyaz kesiliyor. Önündeki adam, Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一报出你的名号，人群中便泛起一阵骚动。有人心生敬畏，有人面色惨白。你面前那个男人比出了双头鹰手势。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一报出你的名号，人群中便泛起一阵骚动。有人心生敬畏，有人面色惨白。你面前那个男人比出了双头鹰手势。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bei der Erwähnung deines Namens geht ein Ruck durch die Menge. Während einige der Umstehenden vor Ehrfurcht erstarren, werden andere leichenblass. Der Mann vor dir macht das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bei der Erwähnung deines Namens geht ein Ruck durch die Menge. Während einige der Umstehenden vor Ehrfurcht erstarren, werden andere leichenblass. Der Mann vor dir macht das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}À l'instant où il prononce votre nom, un changement s'opère dans la foule. Certains sont frappés de stupeur, tandis que d'autres blêmissent à vue d'œil. L'homme devant vous esquisse le signe de l'Aquila.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}À l'instant où il prononce votre nom, un changement s'opère dans la foule. Certains sont frappés de stupeur, tandis que d'autres blêmissent à vue d'œil. L'homme devant vous esquisse le signe de l'Aquila.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En el momento en el que se proclama tu nombre, un cambio recorre la multitud. Algunos quedan maravillados, pero otros empalidecen de pronto. El hombre frente a ti hace el signo del Aquila.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The moment your name is spoken, a change ripples through the crowd. Some are struck with awe, others turn white as ghosts. The man in front of you makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
